description: Vector-only retrieval hit: query 'annual flu shot elderly' uses synonyms not in the exact chunk text ('flu' vs 'influenza', 'shot' vs 'vaccine', 'elderly' vs 'older adults'). BM25 would miss or rank low; dense vector must compensate.
what_bug_this_catches: If the vector retrieval path is disabled or the EvalEmbedder is not producing discriminative vectors, synonym-based queries that rely on semantic similarity never return relevant chunks, breaking evidence retrieval for queries that don't use exact guideline terminology.

input.query: annual flu shot elderly high dose
